testsuite.name: EventBus Tests

testcase.name: listener exception does not affect other listeners
listeners only receive matching event types

testsuite.system-out: 11:11:41.837 [Test worker] DEBUG com.p2p.core.event.EventBus -- Subscribed listener for event type: TestEventA 11:11:41.859 [Test worker] DEBUG com.p2p.core.event.EventBus --
